<style>
  /* General Styles */
body {
   margin: 0;
   font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
   color: rgb(27, 19, 19);
   line-height: 1.6;
   background-color: #bcdcdc;
 }
  /* Hero Section */
 .hero {
   display: flex;
   justify-content: space-between;
   align-items: center;
   padding: 50px;
   background-color: #bcdcdc;
 }


 .hero-content {
   max-width: 50%;
 }
  .hero-content h1 {
   font-size: 2.5rem;
   margin-bottom: 20px;
   color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
 }
  .hero-content p {
   font-size: 1.2rem;
   margin-bottom: 20px;
 }
  .btn {
   padding: 10px 20px;
   font-size: 1rem;
   color: #fff;
   background-color: #007BFF;
   border: none;
   border-radius: 5px;
   cursor: pointer;
   transition: background-color 0.3s;
 }
  .btn:hover {
   background-color: #0056b3;
 }


 img {
   float: center;
 }


 img {
   float: left; 
 }






 .hero-image img {
   max-width: 100%;
   height: 375px;
   border-radius: 10px;
 }
  /* Features Section */
 .features {
   display: flex;
   justify-content: space-around;
   align-items: flex-start;
   padding: 50px;
 }
  .container {
   display: flex; /* Use Flexbox to arrange children in a row */
   justify-content: space-between; /* Space out the items */
   align-items: flex-start; /* Align items to the start of the container */
   gap: 20px; /* Space between the items */
   padding: 20px; /* Optional: add padding around the container */
}


/* Optional CSS Reset */
* {
   margin: 0;
   padding: 0;
   box-sizing: border-box; /* Ensures padding and border are included in width/height */
}

.container {
   display: flex; /* Use Flexbox to arrange children in a row */
   justify-content: space-between; /* Space out the items */
   align-items: flex-start; /* Align items to the start of the container */
   padding: 20px; /* Optional: add padding around the container */
   width: 100%; /* Ensure the container takes full width */
}


.quality-product,
.growth-stratergy,
.competitive-price {
   flex: 1; /* Allow boxes to grow equally */
   max-width: 30%; /* Set a max-width to ensure they fit side by side */
   text-align: center; /* Center text inside the boxes */
   padding: 20px; /* Padding inside each box */
   box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(1, 0, 0, 0.1); /* Box shadow for depth */
   transition: transform 0.3s; /* Transition effect for hover */
   border-color: #000080; /* Border color */
   border-width: 2px; /* Border width */
   border-radius: 20px; /* Rounded corners */
   color: white; /* Text color */
   margin: 0 10px; /* Optional: add margin between boxes */
   height: 200px;
}


.quality-product {
   background-color: black; /* Background color for quality product */
}


.growth-stratergy {
   background-color: #40d4dc; /* Background color for growth strategy */
}


.competitive-price {
   background-color: #18bcbc; /* Background color for competitive price */
}


/* Optional: Add hover effect */
.quality-product:hover,
.growth-stratergy:hover,
.competitive-price:hover {
   transform: scale(1.05); /* Slightly enlarge the box on hover */
}



.quality-product {
   background-color: black; /* Background color for quality product */
}


.growth-stratergy {
   background-color: #40d4dc; /* Background color for growth strategy */
}


.competitive-price {
   background-color: #18bcbc; /* Background color for competitive price */
}


/* Optional: Add hover effect */
.quality-product:hover,
.growth-stratergy:hover,
.competitive-price:hover {
   transform: scale(1.05); /* Slightly enlarge the box on hover */
}


 .feature-item h2 {
   font-size: 1.8rem;
   margin-bottom: 15px;
   color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
 }
  .feature-item p {
   font-size: 1rem;
   color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
 }
  .feature-item:hover {
   transform: scale(1.05);
 }
  /* Responsive Design */
 @media (max-width: 768px) {
   .hero {
     flex-direction: column;
     text-align: center;
   }
    .hero-content {
     max-width: 100%;
     margin-bottom: 20px;
   }
    .features {
     flex-direction: column;
     gap: 20px;
   }
    .feature-item {
     max-width: 100%;
   }
 }
 /* General Reset */
body, h1, h2, p, a {
 margin: 0;
 padding: 0;
 font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
}


body {
 line-height: 1.6;
 color: #333;
}


.container {
 max-width: 1200px;
 margin: 0 auto;
 padding: 20px;
}


/* About Company Section */
.about-company {
 text-align: center;
 padding: 60px 20px;
 background-color: #f8f8f8;
}


.about-company .icon img {
 width: 50px;
}


.about-company h1 {
 font-size: 2.5em;
 margin: 20px 0;
}


.about-company p {
 font-size: 1.1em;
 color: #666;
 margin: 20px 0;
}


.about-company .btn {
 display: inline-block;
 margin-top: 20px;
 padding: 10px 20px;
 background-color: #000;
 color: #fff;
 text-decoration: none;
 border-radius: 5px;
 font-size: 1em;
}


/* Right Thing Section */
.right-thing {
 display: flex;
 flex-wrap: wrap;
 align-items: center;
 background-color: #40d4dc;
 padding: 60px 20px;
}


.right-thing .image {
 flex: 1;
 text-align: center;
}


.right-thing .image img {
 width: 340px;
 height: 340px;
 border-radius: 5px;
}


.right-thing .text {
 flex: 1;
 padding: 20px;
}


.right-thing .text h2 {
 font-size: 2em;
 color: #f8f8f8;
 margin-bottom: 20px;
}


.right-thing .text p {
 font-size: 1.1em;
 color: #fff;
 margin-bottom: 20px;
}


.right-thing .btn {
 display: inline-block;
 padding: 10px 20px;
 background-color: #fff;
 color: #0077b6;
 text-decoration: none;
 border-radius: 35px;
 font-size: 1em;
}


@media (max-width: 768px) {
 .right-thing {
   flex-direction: column;
 }


 .right-thing .image,
 .right-thing .text {
   flex: none;
   width: 100%;
 }
}


/* Our Services Section */
.our-services h2 {
 text-align: center;
 color: #000;
}


.our-services p {
 text-align: center;
 color: #000;
}


/* Services Section */
.services {
 background: #ffffff;
 text-align: center;
 padding: 60px 20px;
}


.services h1 {
 font-size: 200;
}


.services-grid {
 display: grid;
 grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
 gap: 20px;
}


.service {
 background: #ffffff;
 padding: 20px;
 border-radius: 5px;
 text-align: center;
}


.service img {
 max-width: 50px;
 margin-bottom: 10px;
}


.service h3 {
 margin-top: 10px;
 color: #333;
}


.service p {
 margin-top: 10px;
 color: #808080;
 font-weight: 50;
}
.service:hover {
 box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
 transform: translateY(-5px);
 transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
